attachments.fallback: How do I backup IMAP emails to PST file without data loss? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: Exporting IMAP emails to PST without data loss can be done efficiently using the Cigati IMAP Backup Tool, a reliable solution designed for secure email backup and migration. This tool allows users to connect to their IMAP-based email accounts such as Gmail, Yahoo, or Outlook by entering valid login credentials and server details, after which it loads the complete mailbox with all folders.
